query:
INSERT INTO tests (
            battery_id,
            approved,
            device_id,
            mode,
            voltage_before_test_mv,
            target_current_ma,
            target_power_w,
            cutoff_voltage_mv,
            cutoff_time_min,
            charge_voltage_mv,
            charge_cutoff_current_ma,
            measured_capacity_mah,
            measured_energy_mwh,
            end_voltage_mv,
            notes
        )
        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
